flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Wisconsin-Madison fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Wisconsin-Madison are 34% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($73.8k vs $55.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Wisconsin-Madison rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (33.5k → 36.9k).
